strategy: Balance boss (4730). It takes +30% from Balance damage and only resists 4% off-school, so a Balance hit is actually your best option.
Every round it self-shields -25% and lays a +15% trap on every wizard. Those traps help your damage, but the shield state is what keeps it alive.
Do not kill it while its shield and trap cheat is still running, or it revives at full health.

The counter: cast Locust Swarm (Tier 2b), or another Balance echo-trap spell, to make it strip its own wards, remove all wizard traps, and permanently stop the cheat. It gives you the card on round 4.
With the cheat disabled, stack up and land your Balance hit to finish it for good.
cheatNotes: Each round it shields itself -25% and lays a +15% trap on every wizard. The traps actually help your damage, but the shield state is what keeps it alive.
Kill it while that shield and trap cheat is still active and it revives at full health. You must switch the cheat off first.
On round 4 (or after it respawns) it hands each wizard a card. This is the Balance echo-trap spell used to disable its revive.
Casting Locust Swarm (Tier 2b) makes it drop all wards, clear your traps, and permanently stop the shield and trap cheat. Do this before you try to kill it.
Any other Balance spell that Echoes traps has the same effect and disables the revive cheat. Then finish it off.
